name: Week 1 — Skeleton + live feed (auth, simulator, intake→SSE, feed)
Week 2 — Basic admin + organized feed (discovery, enable/disable, kill-switches, categorize/prioritize/filter)
Week 3 — AI features (LLM adapter, summaries, Q&A chatbot, AI config)
Week 4 — Audiences + prefs + interaction (global/team/role/user, prefs, grouping/snooze/actions)
Week 5 — Hardening + admin expansion (Redis intake+dead-letter, audit/observability, broadcasts, perf/tests, prod-auth seam)
